mapper.sql: id, name, team, position, player_type, batting_avg, home_runs, hits, rbi, stolen_bases, era, wins, saves, holds, games, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM player
ORDER BY team, name LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO player (name, team, position, player_type, batting_avg, home_runs, hits, rbi, stolen_bases, era, wins, saves, holds, games) VALUES (#{name}, #{team}, #{position}, #{playerType}, #{battingAvg}, #{homeRuns}, #{hits}, #{rbi}, #{stolenBases}, #{era}, #{wins}, #{saves}, #{holds}, #{games})
mapper.update: UPDATE player SET name = #{name}, team = #{team}, position = #{position}, player_type = #{playerType}, batting_avg = #{battingAvg}, home_runs = #{homeRuns}, hits = #{hits}, rbi = #{rbi}, stolen_bases = #{stolenBases}, era = #{era}, wins = #{wins}, saves = #{saves}, holds = #{holds}, games = #{games}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE player SET saves = #{saves}, holds = #{holds}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE name = #{name} AND team = #{team} AND player_type = 'PITCHER'
mapper.select: SELECT FROM player WHERE player_type = 'BATTER' AND batting_avg IS NOT NULL AND games >= 10 ORDER BY batting_avg DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM player WHERE player_type = 'BATTER' AND home_runs IS NOT NULL ORDER BY home_runs DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM player WHERE player_type = 'BATTER' AND rbi IS NOT NULL ORDER BY rbi DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM player WHERE player_type = 'PITCHER' AND era IS NOT NULL AND games >= 5 ORDER BY era ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM player WHERE player_type = 'PITCHER' AND wins IS NOT NULL ORDER BY wins DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM player WHERE player_type = 'BATTER' AND stolen_bases IS NOT NULL ORDER BY stolen_bases DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM player WHERE player_type = 'PITCHER' AND saves IS NOT NULL AND saves > 0 ORDER BY saves DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM player WHERE player_type = 'PITCHER' AND holds IS NOT NULL AND holds > 0 ORDER BY holds DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT team, SUM(home_runs) AS totalHomeRuns, ROUND(AVG(batting_avg), 3) AS avgBattingAvg, COUNT(*) AS playerCount FROM player WHERE player_type = 'BATTER' GROUP BY team ORDER BY totalHomeRuns DESC
SELECT DISTINCT team FROM player ORDER BY team
